{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260324002849B16234BC140B39C84D5E"}"},"total":157},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7380374313549824792","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"创意不错，希望继续写下去。爹文一定是养成系，不要顺着剧情走，作者要多设计一些剧情冲突。建议写一写盛纮，甄嬛前传的康熙"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1718378871,"group_id":"7359082543141899289","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N6GeIuLEqKDv2UdbjWb53yc=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"101663189289","user_name":"子非鱼0915"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"101663189289","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7359082543141899289","book_info":{"abstract":"平平无奇的许文昊在一次救人中不幸去世，接着发现自己穿越来到了三十而已的世界，而他替换的又恰好是许幻山。
如果只是穿越到影视世界其实没什么，但这个系统就有点不当人了，居然让他喜当“爹”才算完成任务。
无奈之下，许文昊只好很为难的完成了系统设定的任务。
